data.title: Rocket Doctor Amends 45 Degree Agreement
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on April 17, 2026, Rocket Doctor AI Inc. disclosed plans to enhance their Google Advertising strategy. The company (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) has signed an addendum to their agreement with 45 Degrees, Inc., extending services initially initiated on July 18, 2025. Pending regulatory approval, this move will see a specialized media campaign implemented by 45 Degrees to bolster the company's online advertising efforts.

data.title: CVB Financial Corp. Announces Completion of Merger with Heritage Commerce Corp
data.description: CVB Financial Corp. announced on April 17, 2026, the successful completion of mergers involving CVB Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: “CVBF”) and Heritage Commerce Corp (Nasdaq: “HTBK”), as well as their respective banking subsidiaries, Citizens Business Bank (“CBB”) and Heritage Bank of Commerce (“HBC”). The merger took place as per the terms of the Agreement and Plan of Reorganization and Merger signed on December 17, 2025. HTBK merged with CVBF, and HBC merged with CBB in an all-stock transaction.

data.title: Arbe Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: Israeli company Arbe Robotics Ltd., a prominent player in perception radar solutions listed on both NASDAQ and TASE, revealed receiving a letter from Nasdaq on April 13, 2026. The notification highlighted that the company fell short of Nasdaq's listing rules as the closing bid price of its Ordinary shares stayed below $1 per share for 30 consecutive business days. This development potentially jeopardizes Arbe's continued listing on Nasdaq.

data.title: LCI Industries Confirms Discussions Regarding Potential Merger of Equals with Patrick Industries, Inc.
data.description: ELKHART, Indiana - LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII) has officially stated that talks are underway with Patrick Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: PATK) for a potential merger of equal standing. The current discussions are in progress, with no guarantees yet on the outcome or the specific terms of any potential merger. LCI Industries has announced they will refrain from further comments unless there is a need for more disclosure. LCI Industries, a prominent company in the industry, plans to continue negotiations cautiously, considering all factors involved.

data.title: Patrick Industries, Inc. Confirms Discussions with LCI Industries Regarding a Potential Merger of Equals
data.description: Elkhart, Indiana - On April 17, 2026, Patrick Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: PATK), a prominent provider of component solutions for the Outdoor Enthusiast and Housing sectors, announced its ongoing discussions with LCI Industries (NYSE: LCII). The talks concern a potential collaboration or agreement between the two companies. Patrick Industries is known for its strong presence in the market, catering to the outdoor and housing industries, while LCI Industries is recognized on the New York Stock Exchange. Further updates on this development may follow as the discussions progress.

data.title: ASC Ortho Management Company, LLC d/b/a Aligned Orthopedic Partners Provides Notice Following Data Security Incident
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on April 17, 2026, ASC Ortho Management Company, LLC, also known as Aligned Orthopedic Partners, informed individuals about a data security breach that might have exposed their personal and/or protected health data.

data.title: Popular Global Bakery Café Paris Baguette Opens New Location in Owings Mills
data.description: A French-inspired bakery café will hold a "soft opening" on April 20, 2026, in Owings Mills, Maryland. Paris Baguette, renowned for its handcrafted pastries, breads, and cakes, will launch its latest store at Metro Centre. The opening is scheduled for April 17, 2026.

data.title: OVED & OVED SUCCESSFUL IN OBTAINING DECISIVE APPELLATE COURT VICTORY ON BEHALF OF CLIENT
data.description: In a recent development on April 17, 2026, Oved & Oved LLP achieved a significant win in the appellate court for their client. The Appellate Division, First Department overturned a previous decision and dropped a lawsuit accusing fraudulent inducement. The lower court ruling was dismissed entirely, following a unanimous decision by the appellate judges. This victory underscores the firm's prowess in handling legal matters effectively.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics Reports Inducement Grants under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in San Carlos, California, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) revealed the approval of granting inducement stock options. The options cover a total of 135,470 shares of the company's common stock and were issued to twelve incoming non-executive employees. Iovance focuses on developing groundbreaking polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for cancer patients.

data.title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Proposed Public Offering of $175 Million of Common Stock
data.description: Today, Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLO) disclosed its plans to conduct an underwritten public offering of $175 million worth of its common stock, all offered by Allogene. The company also plans to provide underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $26.25 million of common stock. The completion of the offering is subject to market conditions and other factors, making it uncertain if or when it will be finalized, along with the final size and terms of the offering.

data.title: Hampton finishes issuing shares to settle debt.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant improvement in job opportunities. The total number of new jobs created in the last month stands at 200,000, reflecting a promising trend in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 5% increase, with the Dow Jones index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening economy and a growing sense of confidence among investors. It is anticipated that this positive momentum will continue in the coming months, providing further stability and growth in the financial sector.
Software Stocks Were Called Dead – They Just Had Their Best Day In A Year

data.title: Polymarket predicts 73% chance of normal Hormuz Strait traffic by May 31, 2026.
data.description: According to a prediction market platform called Polymarket, traders are estimating a 73% likelihood of the Suez Canal resuming normal traffic by May 31, 2026.

data.title: Suite Studios & Frame.io Drive: Bringing File Streaming to Creative Teams Everywhere
data.description: Suite Studios is introducing its file streaming technology to Frame.io Drive in Boulder, Colo. This advancement will allow Frame.io users to quickly access their media at a local level.

data.title: Granite REIT Declares Distribution for April 2026
data.description: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN) revealed a distribution of CDN $0.2958 per unit for April 2026. The distribution is set to be paid on May 15, 2026, to unitholders of record on April 30, 2026. Granite ensures that none of the distribution is considered effectively connected income for U.S. federal tax purposes.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses 7-month resistance, rallying amidst global changes. Predicted to hit $84K next.
data.description: After seven months of decline, the price of Bitcoin has surged, driven by geopolitical changes and predictions from market analysts. Experts are now forecasting Bitcoin to reach $84,000 in the near future.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Surges Amid Epic Strategy Buying Spree
data.description: The average daily trading volume for Stretch preferred stock from Strategy has significantly increased. This surge comes in the midst of a buying frenzy by Strategy, coinciding with a notable uptick in Bitcoin prices.

data.title: This Is How Much Q1 Earnings Growth Rests On Nvidia. It's A Lot.
data.description: In the first quarter, Nvidia is projected to significantly boost earnings growth for the Magnificent 7 and the entire S&P 500. The company is expected to be the primary driver of growth, with a substantial impact on overall performance. This indicates the pivotal role Nvidia plays in the financial landscape, with its contributions set to make a significant difference.

data.title: Notice of 2026 First Quarter Results Conference Call and Webcast for Investors and Analysts and Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Acadian Timber Corp., based in Edmundston, New Brunswick, is set to unveil its 2026 first quarter results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. Interested parties can access the report on the company's official website at www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/. Following this release, a conference call and webcast will take place on May 7, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). During this event, the senior management team will delve into the financial and operational performance of the company.

data.title: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan Postpones Modifier 25 Policy in Response to Osteopathic Advocacy
data.description: In Chicago, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan (BCBSM) has decided to delay the implementation of its reimbursement policy impacting evaluation and management (E/M) services billed with modifier 25. This move is crucial in ensuring precise physician reimbursement, lessening administrative workload, and maintaining patient accessibility to prompt, top-notch care. The postponement, disclosed on April 15, comes after substantial input from osteopathic physicians and organized medicine concerning the policy's implications.
